manifest.name: DevOps Infrastructure Showcase Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# DevOps Infrastructure Showcase

Generated example ANIP package from Studio-style source docs.

intent.summary: List current service deployments and status.
Get health and performance metrics for a service.
Scale the replica count for a deployment.
Update a configuration key-value pair for a service.
Roll back a service deployment to a previous version.
Permanently destroy a non-production environment; direct principal action is required.

capability_formalizations.title: List deployments
capability_formalizations.summary: List current service deployments and status.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

capability_formalizations.title: Get service health
capability_formalizations.summary: Get health and performance metrics for a service.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for service_name when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Scale replicas
capability_formalizations.summary: Scale the replica count for a deployment.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for service_name when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for replicas when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Update config
capability_formalizations.summary: Update a configuration key-value pair for a service.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for service_name when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for key when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for value when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Rollback deployment
capability_formalizations.summary: Roll back a service deployment to a previous version.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for service_name when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for target_version when it is missing or ambiguous.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for resource_type when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for resource_name when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Destroy environment
capability_formalizations.summary: Permanently destroy a non-production environment; direct principal action is required.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for environment_name when it is missing or ambiguous.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Allow tutorial users to invoke declared capabilities within the scopes shown by each capability.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: Generated examples keep policy simple and visible for onboarding.

runtime_policy_bindings.business_rule: Use the declared capability scope and required inputs as the tutorial boundary.
runtime_policy_bindings.enforcement_notes: Generated examples use simple policy so the contract remains readable.

capability_mappings.intent: List current service deployments and status.

capability_mappings.intent: Get health and performance metrics for a service.

capability_mappings.intent: Scale the replica count for a deployment.

capability_mappings.intent: Roll back a service deployment to a previous version.

capability_mappings.intent: Permanently destroy a non-production environment; direct principal action is required.
